Changes.LogName: Joja CC Treasure Hunt Start Event Data

Entries.TreasureHuntBundleStart/GameStateQuery P: continue/39 36/Jas 42 36 3 Vincent 42 37 3 farmer 39 35 2/pause 500/skippable/speak Jas "Hey @!$h"/pause 200/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 500/emote farmer 32/pause 300/move farmer 0 1 1 true/speak Vincent "Did you see our Treasure Hunt bundle in the new Civic Center?"/pause 200/question null "Civic Center bundle?#What? There were bundles in there?#I did see it, but what is a Treasure Hunt Tag?"/pause 500/speak Jas "Come follow us and we'll tell you everything$h."/pause 300/move Jas -2 0 0/playSound openBox/move Vincent -2 0 0 true/pause 300/warp Jas -1 -1/playSound doorClose/fade/viewport -1000 -1000/changeLocation JojaCC/addObject 30 10 (O)blue704.JojaCC_bundlebook 0/warp Jas 29 12/warp Vincent 31 11/warp farmer 30 14/playMusic jaunty/pause 1000/viewport 30 10 true/move farmer 0 -2 0 Jas 0 -2 1 Vincent 0 -1 3/pause 800/speak Vincent "Here it is!$h"/pause 500/faceDirection Jas 2 true/pause 100/faceDirection Vincent 2 true/pause 800/speak Jas "We put a lot of work into this."/pause 600/speak Vincent "Yeah I built the sign all by myself."/pause 500/quickQuestion Would you like to play a Treasure Hunt game with us?#Yeah I'd love to guys!#I don't know I'm pretty busy around the farm these days...#(break)pause 300\emote Jas 20 true\emote Vincent 20 true\speak Vincent "Yes I knew you would play with us!$h"\pause 500\speak Jas "All you have to do is follow the clues on the sign to where another bundle is located somewhere in the valley.#$b#Once you complete that bundle you'll get a special Treasure Hunt Tag that you can bring back here for a big reward."\pause 800\speak Vincent "I bet you won't be able to find them all. We hid them real good."\pause 1000\emote farmer 20\pause 300\speak Jas "The other bundle won't be ready until the next day though!#$b#Give us some time to set it all up.$h"\pause 1000\speak Vincent "Yes!$h#$b#I get to do the first one."(break)pause 200\emote Jas 28 true\emote Vincent 28 true\pause 1000\action AddFriendshipPoints Jas -250\action AddFriendshipPoints Vincent -250\speak Vincent "Well if you change your mind @ we'll leave it here...$s"\pause 1000\speak Jas "We worked really hard making this @!$s#$b#If you just try it I know you'll have fun..."\pause 800\speak Vincent "I guess the clues are on my sign if you decide to play our game later...$s"(break)/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Farmer Bundle 01 Complete Event Data

Entries.FarmerBundle01Complete/GameStateQuery PL: continue/-2000 -2000/Morris 92 53 1 farmer -100 -100 0/message "Just now at JojaMart..."/viewport 96 51/addObject 97 52 (F)LargeJojaCrate/fade false/pause 500/skippable/emote Morris 8/pause 800/speak Morris "What do we have here?#$b#It must be that shipment that I was expecting!$h"/pause 300/move Morris 4 0 1/pause 300/shake Morris 800/playSound openBox/pause 300/speak Morris "Yes! Just what I was expecting.#$b#Pierre thought he had the upper hand but now JojaMart is the only supplier of these premium seeds.$h"/pause 500/speak Morris "Let's see what is in here exactly.#$b#There are garlic, rhubarb, strawberry, blueberry, red cabbage, artichoke, beet, and what else is in here at the bottom?"/pause 500/emote Morris 16/pause 400/speak Morris "There are even starfruit and cactus seeds in here!#$b#Haha. Pierre is in trouble now..."/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Farmer Bundle 05 Complete Event Data

Entries.FarmerBundle05Complete/GameStateQuery PL: continue/-2000 -2000/Morris 92 53 1 farmer -100 -100 0/message "Just now at JojaMart..."/viewport 96 51/addObject 97 52 (F)LargeJojaCrate/fade false/pause 500/skippable/emote Morris 8/pause 800/speak Morris "What is that smell?#$b#It's terrible!"/move Morris 1 0 2/pause 400/faceDirection Morris 3/pause 400/faceDirection Morris 1/pause 300/speak Morris "It is coming from the box.#$b#That must mean that it's the shipment of fertilizer I ordered."/pause 600/move Morris 3 0 1/pause 300/shake Morris 800/playSound openBox/pause 300/speak Morris "Cough.Cough.#$b#It's even worse inside.#$b#I hope this fertilizer sells better than it smells."/pause 500/speak Morris "Let's see what is in here exactly.#$b#There is some tree fertilizer, some deluxe retaining soil, a little deluxe fertilizer, and what else is that?"/pause 500/emote Morris 16/pause 400/speak Morris "There's even some hyper speed gro in here!#$b#I thought that stuff was radioactive..."/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Forager Bundle Complete Event Data

Entries.ForagerBundleComplete/GameStateQuery PLA: continue/39 36/Morris 39 37 0 farmer 40 35 2 Leah 40 37 0/pause 500/skippable/speak Morris "Ah, perfect timing. I see you just completed the Forager Bundle."/pause 300/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Morris "I was just bringing Leah here to see the new shop that she's opening.#$b#Let's step inside so that Leah can see her new place."/pause 300/emote Leah 32/pause 500/fade/changeToTemporaryMap JojaCC/viewport 13 22/warp Morris 13 22/warp Leah 13 20/faceDirection Leah 2/warp farmer 11 20/faceDirection farmer 1/playMusic jaunty/pause 500/faceDirection Leah 3/pause 400/faceDirection Leah 1/pause 400/faceDirection Leah 3/pause 500/emote Leah 20/pause 500/speak Leah "Wow this is amazing!$h#$b#Thank you @. I know that it was a lot of work to find all of those things, but I am really grateful."/pause 300/speak Leah "And to show my appreciation me and Morris have a little surprise for you!$h"/pause 500/faceDirection Leah 2/pause 300/speak Morris "That's right. Leah has discovered a lovely clearing behind the Bus Stop and has asked Joja to open a path so that you can use it.$h"/pause 500/faceDirection Leah 3/pause 300/speak Leah "You'll love it @! There's even an old shed there that I'm sure you'll find a use for.$h"/pause 600/speak Morris "Just give us some time and we'll have it opened right up for you.#$b#I believe we should have all of the work done by tomorrow morning."/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Farmer Bundle Complete Event Data

Entries.FarmerBundleComplete/GameStateQuery PLAY: continue/39 36/Morris 39 37 0 farmer 40 35 2 Evelyn 40 37 0/pause 500/speak Morris "Ah, perfect timing. I see you just completed the Farmer Bundle."/pause 300/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Morris "I was just bringing Mrs. Mullner here to see the new shop that she's opening.#$b#Let's step inside so that she can see her new place."/pause 300/emote Evelyn 32/pause 500/fade/changeToTemporaryMap JojaCC/viewport 7 9/warp Morris 6 6/faceDirection Morris 2/warp Evelyn 7 7/warp farmer 7 10/playMusic jaunty/pause 500/faceDirection Evelyn 3/pause 400/faceDirection Evelyn 1/pause 400/faceDirection Evelyn 0/pause 500/emote Evelyn 20/pause 500/speak Evelyn "Oh my goodness this is amazing.$h"/pause 500/move Evelyn 0 -2 0/faceDirection Morris 0/pause 300/speak Evelyn "This kitchen is just so beautiful.$h"/pause 200/move Evelyn -1 0 0/pause 300/emote Evelyn 20/pause 300/faceDirection Evelyn 2/pause 500/speak Evelyn "Thank you @. I can only imagine how hard you worked to stock this kitchen so well.$h"/pause 300/emote farmer 32/pause 500/speak Evelyn "But do you know what is missing?$h"/pause 500/emote Morris 8 true/emote farmer 8/pause 300/faceDirection Evelyn 1/pause 300/speak Evelyn "It would be just perfect if we could have a little cellar inside the pantry over there."/pause 500/faceDirection Evelyn 2/pause 300/emote Morris 16/speak Morris "You know Mrs. Mullner, I was thinking the exact same thing.$h#$b#Joja's workers are coming today to install one right away. If all goes to plan, it should be ready to age some Joja wine and mead bright and early tomorrow morning!$h"/pause 600/speak Evelyn "Oh my goodness.#$b#It couldn't be more perfect you two."/pause 500/emote Morris 32 true/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Evelyn "This will be the perfect place to share some of my recipes and my food with the whole town."/pause 500/end
